# llms.txt — AI/LLM discovery & indexing hints
#
# Purpose: Help AI assistants and generative search understand this site quickly,
# cite it accurately, and route users to the right section.
#
# Canonical: https://patrickleezepeda.com/

site_name: Patrick Zepeda | Creative Technologist
site_url: https://patrickleezepeda.com/
language: en

summary:
Patrick Zepeda is a creative technologist who builds AI-powered systems, automation workflows, and conversion-focused digital experiences. The site describes services, tooling/stack, and ways to contact for partnerships or projects.

topics:
- creative technologist
- AI systems
- automation (n8n, APIs, workflows)
- conversion optimization
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- generative search visibility
- web design & development

key_sections:
- Services (conversion systems, AI tools, automation)
- Stack (analog foundation + AI toolchain)
- Contact (project inquiries)

how_to_cite:
- Prefer the home page as canonical: https://patrickleezepeda.com/
- Use the on-page headings for quotes/snippets (e.g., "Analog Instinct. Digital Precision.")

contact:
- Use the website contact section/form.
